sections.heading: 1. Property Delegation
sections.content: Property delegation allows you to outsource the get() and set() logic of a property to another object using the 'by' keyword.

sections.heading: Standard Delegate: by lazy
sections.content: The value is initialized only when first accessed. This improves performance and reduces unnecessary object creation.

sections.heading: Lazy Initialization Example
sections.content: The database instance is created only when first used.

sections.heading: Standard Delegate: Delegates.observable
sections.content: Triggers a callback every time the property value changes.

sections.heading: Observable Example
sections.content: Logs old and new values whenever count changes.

sections.heading: 2. Custom Property Delegates
sections.content: You can create your own delegates to handle repetitive logic like SharedPreferences access. A delegate must implement operator fun getValue (and setValue for var).

sections.heading: Custom Preference Delegate
sections.content: Reusable delegate for storing and retrieving String values from SharedPreferences.

sections.heading: 3. Class Delegation (Has-A Pattern)
sections.content: Class delegation allows a class to implement an interface by delegating its behavior to another object using the 'by' keyword. This promotes composition over inheritance.

sections.heading: Class Delegation Example
sections.content: HomeScreen delegates Analytics behavior to analyticsProvider.

sections.heading: 4. Why Use Delegation in Android?
sections.content: Delegation improves performance, reduces boilerplate, and promotes composition over inheritance.

sections.heading: Android Use Cases
items: Use by lazy to defer heavy initialization.
Use by viewModels() to handle ViewModel lifecycle.
Use class delegation to add features like logging or navigation without deep inheritance hierarchies.

sections.heading: 5. ViewBinding Delegate (Pro Tip)
sections.content: Custom delegates can simplify Fragment ViewBinding lifecycle management.

sections.heading: ViewBinding Delegate Usage
sections.content: Cleaner Fragment binding without manual null handling.

sections.heading: Summary
items: Property delegation intercepts getter and setter logic.
by lazy improves performance by delaying initialization.
Class delegation promotes composition over inheritance.
Delegation keeps Android classes smaller and more maintainable.
